description: An electric-bike shop on Neal Street in Grass Valley. Area 13 sells complete e-bikes alongside parts, accessories, and upgrade kits for existing rides.
An Italian ristorante on Bank Street in Grass Valley. Alloro sits at 124 Bank St.

A natural winery on Cement Hill Road in Nevada City making old-world-style wines from Nevada County grapes. Arquils takes what it calls a '100% natural, sustainable approach' — hand-harvested, zero-intervention, with no sulfur added.
A German restaurant and brewery on Spring Street in Nevada City. BrewHaus serves bratwurst, pretzels, and beer brewed on-site in what it calls 'a relaxed, family-friendly, dog-friendly setting.'
A coffee roaster on South Auburn Street in Grass Valley. Caroline's Coffee Roasters is at 128 S Auburn St.
A candy and ice cream shop on Nevada City Highway in Grass Valley. Coco's scoops ice cream, sells candy and gifts, and hosts parties in its own party room.
A Mexican restaurant on South Auburn Street in Grass Valley serving what it calls 'authentic Mexican food,' from carne asada tacos to margaritas.
A cheese and wine shop on Main Street in Grass Valley, featured in MUSE's 'New Gold in Nevada County.'
A boutique hotel and event venue on North Auburn Street in Grass Valley. Grass Valley Courtyard Suites offers rooms and suites, a pool and hot tub, breakfast service, and meeting space.
An eat-and-drink stop on Broad Street in Nevada City. McGee's Annex sits at 315 Broad St.
A caffe on Mill Street in Grass Valley. Sergio's Caffe is at 109 Mill St.
A sushi restaurant on Argall Way in Nevada City. Sushi in the Raw serves Japanese sushi at 135 Argall Way, sharing its address with California Organics, with reservations through Resy.
A family-owned take-out pizzeria on Commercial Street in Nevada City. The Pizza Joint makes New York, Detroit, and Grandma-style pizza by the slice or whole pie, with draft beer to go with it.
A gift and tea shop on Broad Street in Nevada City. Gold Mountain invites visitors to 'travel the world' through its collection of imported treasures, alongside a curated tea selection.
A bottle shop on Colfax Avenue in Grass Valley. Long's Bottle Shop is at 420 Colfax Ave.
An eat-and-drink stop on Commercial Street in Nevada City. The Outpost sits at 405 Commercial St.
A bar and restaurant on Donner Pass Road in Truckee. Bar of America serves food and drink with weekend brunch, live music, banquet facilities, and a full bar.
A Sierra Club-built lodge on Donner Pass Road near Donner Lake and Lake Tahoe. Clair Tappaan offers lodge and backcountry-hut stays, dining, winter equipment rentals, and group hosting.
A cafe on Penn Valley Drive in Penn Valley. Daybreak Cafe is at 17438 Penn Valley Dr.
A handmade artisan chocolate shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee. Dorinda's crafts truffles, bon bons, and pralines by hand, with build-your-own boxes and a monthly chocolate subscription.
A Mexican restaurant on Donner Pass Road in Truckee. La Bamba is at 11760 Donner Pass Rd.
A lodge on State Highway 267 in Truckee, featured in MUSE's 'Mountain Heart. Small-Town Soul.'

A ski shop, tune shop, and bar rolled into one on Donner Pass Road in Truckee. RMU offers 'high quality handmade skis, full service tune shop, packs, bar and food,' in its words — from ski tuning to cocktails under one roof.
A SpringHill Suites by Marriott hotel on East Jibboom Street in Truckee. The hotel sits at 10640 E Jibboom St.
A hotel on West River Street in Truckee. Tahoe Star Hotel is at 10015 W River St.
A wine bar on Donner Pass Road in Truckee, featured in MUSE's 'New Gold in Nevada County.'

A specialty food shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee, near the train station. Tahoe Oil & Spice offers 'more than 50 extra virgin and flavor infused olive oil and balsamic vinegar,' plus specialty oils, spices, and honey.
